events.name: Japan Trip 2026
events.context: Two-week trip with Dana covering Osaka, Nara, Kyoto, Takayama, and Tokyo. Currently on day 12 of trip. Planning to buy eyeglasses and explore fountain pens during the journey.
events.hook: Hugo should look up eyeglasses stores in Kyoto and validate insurance/prescription requirements for buying 4 pairs. Also needs to finalize activity plans for remaining cities.

actions.name: Look up eyeglasses stores in Kyoto for early trip shopping
Validate insurance/prescription requirements for buying 4 pairs of glasses
